title: Pipeline State
description: Canonical schema for pipeline-state.json. Every agent and orchestrator must produce state that validates against this schema.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the pipeline was created.

orchestration_mode.description: Which orchestrator produced this state. `agents` = v3.0 agent-orchestrator. `skills` = v2.0 skill-orchestrator (fallback).

parallel_review.description: Whether code review was/should be run as three parallel focus agents (security/quality/compliance) rather than a single full review. Orchestrator hint.

selected_phases.description: Phases the user chose to run. Phases not in this list are skipped during continuation. If absent, all phases are selected.

current_phase.description: Phase the pipeline is currently at or most recently touched.

phases.description: Per-phase state. Keys: brainstorm XOR investigation (never both), planning, implementation, code-review, testing, documentation.

not.description: brainstorm and investigation are mutually exclusive.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this phase. `blocked` only applies to code-review and testing — triggers a fix loop back to implementation.

outputs.description: Artifact paths produced by this phase (relative to project root).

verdict.description: Code-review only. Maps to status as follows: 🛑 Block / ⚠️ Request Changes → status: blocked. ✅ Approve / ✅ Approve+ → status: completed.

doc_impacts.description: Code-review only. Changes that require documentation updates.

review_statistics.description: Code-review re-review only. Acceptance rate, modified/dismissed counts.

phase_count.description: Planning only. Number of phases in the plan.

last_completed_task.description: Implementation only. Index of last task completed (for resume).

current_task.description: Implementation only. Index of task currently in progress (for resume).

completed_tasks.description: Implementation only. Ordered list of completed task indices.

tech_stack.description: Implementation only. Detected or chosen tech stack.

finding_outcomes.description: Code-review re-review only. Tracks how each prior finding was handled.
